name: White Chocolate Biggies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease cookie sheets or line with parchment paper.
3. Beat butter, sugars, vanilla and eggs in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Combine flour, cocoa, baking soda and salt in a medium bowl; blend into creamed mixture until smooth.
5. Stir in white chocolate chips, pecans and raisins.
6. Scoop out about 1/3 cup dough for each cookie.
7. Place on prepared cookie sheets, about 4 inches apart.
8. Flatten each cookie slightly.
9. Bake 12-14 minutes or until firm in center.
10. Cool 5 minutes on cookie sheets; remove to wire racks to cool completely.
11. Makes about 2 dozen large cookies.
